title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Microfiber Super King Fitted Sheet (25cm) Deep Bed Sheets - Breathable, Fade & Wrinkle Resistant - Elasticated Corners - Mattress Bedsheet (182x200cm) - White
features: INCLUDE COMPONENTS : 1 x super king fitted sheet measuring width 182 x length 200 cm and up to 10 inches (25 cm) in depth.
MATERIAL COMPOSTION: The durable fitted sheet is crafted from high-quality material (100% Polyester ) for a soft, cozy feel that's also durable and long-lasting.
ELASTIC CORNER : The corner elastic design on fitted sheet ensures effortless and secure placement on the mattress, facilitating easy bed-making and a snug fit.
SOFT AND SMOOTH: This exquisite bed sheet slide smoothly over your skin as you shift in your slumber, allowing you to get the rest you deserve night after night.
CLEANING INSTRUCTIONS：Machine Washable at 40℃, Wash Dark Colour Seperately. Non Iron , Do not bleach and tumble dry on low
description: MICROFIBER FITTED SHEET ★ Whatever your bed size, you can find the perfect fit from among our microfiber range. With a variety of styles to choose from fitted sheets, there is something for everyone!. ★ The exquisite & sumptuous sheets slide smoothly over your skin as you shift in your slumber, allowing you to get the rest you deserve night after night. ★ Sumptuous living: a step towards luxury, delicacy and your desired softness. ★ These expertly manufactured bed sheets are designed to help keep you resting comfortably at the ideal temperature throughout the night by keeping heat close to your skin while avoiding overheating. ★ An attractive and modern addition to your bedroom furnishings. ★ It could not be simpler to care for these easy-care bed sheets in the convenience of your own home ★ Material Composition: 100% Polyester ★ Available Sizes : Single: 91 x 193 cm Double: 137 x 193 cm King: 152 x 203 cm Super King: 182x200 cm ★ Includes: 1x Fitted Sheet ★ Care Instructions: Machine Washable. Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach. Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Steam ironing may be a risk. ★ Brand: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Note: All photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colors may slightly vary from the pictures.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Do not Dry clean, Do not bleach, Iron at low temperature, Machine Wash, Tumble dry at low temperature
